title: Python for Everybody

description: Learn SQL fundamentals for data analysis and data science roles.

title: Docker for Beginners
description: Full Docker course covering containers, images, and deployment.

title: Python Crash Course (Full Course)
description: freeCodeCamp's beginner Python course covering variables, loops, functions, and OOP.

title: Python Intermediate Tutorial
description: Covers decorators, generators, threading, multiprocessing, and context managers.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Kaggle's hands-on Python micro-course covering syntax, functions, lists, and loops for data science.

title: Google IT Automation with Python

title: R Programming Full Course

title: R for Data Science
description: Johns Hopkins specialization covering R basics, data visualization, and reproducible research.

description: Duke University course on probability, inference, linear regression, and Bayesian statistics using R.

title: Intro to SQL
description: Kaggle micro-course on SQL basics using Google BigQuery — SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, and JOINs.

title: Advanced SQL
description: Advanced SQL techniques including CTEs, window functions, nested queries, and optimisation in BigQuery.

title: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript Full Course

description: Kaggle course covering Seaborn and Matplotlib for creating insightful charts and visualisations.

title: Data Cleaning
description: Handle missing values, inconsistent data types, data leakage, and messy real-world datasets.

description: 10-course IBM certificate covering Python, SQL, data visualisation, ML, and a capstone project.

title: Data Science Full Course
